{% load i18n %} {% load static %}

{% trans "What's BitMart?" %}

{% trans "BitMart is a globally recognized cryptocurrency exchange known for its wide range of digital assets and trading options. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned trader, BitMart offers an intuitive platform, high liquidity, and advanced features to support efficient and secure trading experiences." %}

  • {% trans 'Diverse crypto assets and trading pairs' %}
  • {% trans 'Low fees and high performance' %}
  • {% trans 'Enterprise-grade security infrastructure' %}
  • {% trans 'Easy-to-navigate interface for all users' %}

{% trans 'What can you trade with BitMart?' %}

{% trans 'With BitMart, you can trade the following:' %}

  • {% trans 'Spot Trading' %}: {% trans 'Quantity is measured in base asset units. Your account must have sufficient base and quote balances to trade in both directions.' %}
  • {% trans 'USD‑M Futures (USDT‑M, USDC‑M)' %}: {% trans 'Quantity is measured in base asset units.' %}
  • {% trans 'COIN‑M Futures' %}: {% trans 'Quantity is measured in contract units.' %}

{% trans "USD‑M and COIN‑M Futures" %}: {% trans "Hedge Mode is available by switching your position mode to" %} {% trans "Hedge" %}{% trans "; otherwise, the account will operate in One‑Way Mode." %}

{% trans 'USD‑M and COIN‑M Futures' %}: {% trans 'Margin and leverage settings can be adjusted directly on the BitMart trading platform.' %}

{% trans 'API Key Setup Process' %}

{% trans 'Follow the steps below to create and configure your API keys for BitMart.' %}

{% include 'include/warnings.html' with warning='Never share your API keys with anyone. We use industry-standard encryption to secure your credentials.' %}

1 {% trans 'Create a BitMart Account' %}

{% trans 'If you don’t already have a BitMart account, please sign up' %} {% trans 'here' %} {% trans '.' %}

2 {% trans 'Go to API Management' %}

  1. {% trans 'Log in to your BitMart account.' %}
  2. {% trans "Click on your profile icon at the top-right corner and select" %} {% trans "API Management" %}.

3 {% trans 'Create an API Key' %}

  1. {% trans "Click" %} {% trans "Create API" %}.
  2. {% trans 'Enter a memo for your API key (Make sure to remember the memo because you will need it).' %}
  3. {% trans 'Set the necessery permissions (Spot Trade, Future Trade).' %}

4 {% trans 'Set IP Whitelist and Confirm' %}

  1. {% trans "Paste our server's IP address in the IP whitelist field:" %} {{ server_ip }}.
  2. {% trans 'Complete any security verification required (e.g., 2FA, email code).' %}
  3. {% trans "Once done, click" %} {% trans "Confirm" %} {% trans "to get your API credentials." %}

{% trans 'Complete the Connection' %}

{% trans 'Copy your API Key and Secret, then paste them into the integration form in your IsAlgo automate dashboard. Ensure you keep your credentials safe and never share them.' %}
